content: DynamoDB quota patterns: read-then-write check of seconds_used/concurrency is a race; must use conditional writes (attribute_not_exists / value < limit) or optimistic version attribute. ADD atomic counters can't enforce a cap alone — pair UpdateExpression ADD with ConditionExpression on the cap. Use ReturnValuesOnConditionCheckFailure to avoid extra reads. Concurrency slots need conditional-write markers with TTL cleanup for crashed sessions or slots leak.
